Jumak (Menu)
Loading image:
Experience our unique cocktail program that highlights Korean-inspired flavors, featuring our handcrafted soju and makgeolli. At our space, you'll savor perfectly balanced cocktails infused with the rich culinary heritage of Korea. From traditional influences to innovative twists, our drinks are designed to celebrate the vibrant spirit of Korean culture.
We’re thrilled to partner with the talented team at
Postern Coffee
, known for their expertly brewed coffee, and Chef Lino Yi who brings authentic Korean flavors and modern techniques to the table. Together, we’re creating a space where spirits, coffee, and Korean-inspired cuisine come together in perfect harmony.
Whether you’re here to sip on our craft soju cocktails, enjoy a warm cup of Postern’s exceptional coffee, or indulge in Chef Lino Yi's mouthwatering dishes, our shared vision is to build a welcoming community hub. By amplifying the voices of Asian American creators, we aim to celebrate diversity and innovation in every glass, cup, and plate.
Join us as we blend tradition and creativity, serving up unforgettable flavors that honor the past and inspire the future.
